creator: thierry@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 201725
Patch to upgrade Soprano

The attached patch upgrades Soprano to the development version, in order to build it against Qt5 (this library is used by math/rkward-kde, which depends on Qt5).

Note: there is no release yet, but since this port is tagged DEPRECATED, no need to repocopy for a -devel port.

Note for the maintainers: since I'm here, I have set the licenses, but I'm not sure about LICENSE_COMB, please check it.
